sentences.english: The most important lesson I've learned is that nobody has it all figured out, even if they look like they do.
sentences.korean: 배운 가장 중요한 교훈은 아무도 다 알아낸 게 아니라는 거예요. 그래 보여도요.

sentences.english: Be kind to yourself, because you can't take care of others if you're burned out.
sentences.korean: 자신에게 친절하세요. 번아웃 상태면 다른 사람을 돌볼 수 없으니까요.

sentences.english: Done is better than perfect, which is something I wish I learned earlier in life.
sentences.korean: 완벽하기보다 끝내는 게 나아요. 인생에서 더 일찍 배웠으면 좋았을 텐데요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
